description: Registry of every web game built by gh-game-factory. Never duplicate an entry — check name, description, category, and genre before building.

games.name: bidstorm
games.description: Bidding card game with no luck in the deal: every player holds the identical hand 1-13 and secretly commits one card per flipped prize, highest bid takes the pot and every card played is burned forever, while a tie for the lead wins nothing and carries the pot into the next round. Every hand is public, so it's a decision rather than a guess. Three modes (Classic, Foresight's two-prize lookahead, Blitz's seven cards where a tie burns the prize); solo vs bots, live P2P for 2-6, or an async seed-share challenge.

games.name: lumenlock
games.description: Light-routing puzzle: a white beam hits a prism and fans into a rainbow (red bends left, green straight, blue right); flip mirrors and half-silvered splitters to lock every crystal in its exact colour, where a crystal sums everything it receives so a stray beam spoils it and a white crystal takes either untouched white light or red+green+blue recombined. Solo, with an exhaustively-searched true par, a UTC Daily Lock and seeded share links.

games.name: nightwire
games.description: Hidden-role social deduction on a ring of seats: each night you probe a seat and learn how many Ghosts sit in that 3-seat window, but while Crew readings publish automatically and truthfully, Ghosts choose what number to publish — eject every Ghost before the nightly wire cuts cause a blackout; solo vs solver bots or live P2P for 4-10 humans.

games.name: gravity-golf
games.description: Slingshot physics mini-golf: pull back to launch and bend your ball around gravity wells (attractors pull, repulsors push, black holes swallow) into the hole across 9 procedural holes; solo, async seed-share, or live P2P race up to 6 players.

games.name: snake-royale
games.description: Classic snake in a shared arena: eat pellets to grow and score, avoid walls/snakes/your own tail; solo Endless score-attack plus live P2P Royale where the last snake alive wins.

games.name: rhythm-relay
games.description: Two-lane rhythm game: notes relay left↔right toward a hit line; tap in time to build a shared combo and score multiplier, misses drain energy; solo or take a lane each in live P2P co-op.

games.name: hexbloom
games.description: Turn-based hex-grid area control: pick a colour to recolour your territory and absorb every touching tile of it; largest territory when the board fills wins.

games.name: cipher-clash
games.description: Boggle-style word-grid race; drag touching letters to spell words, and in versus a word only scores for whoever claims it first.
